settings.title: Contact Us
settings.text: If you have any issues with your order, need additional information, or just want insight into the community we are trying to build. Contact us on the contact page or shoot us an email at info@golfprintclub.com

settings.code:
<style>input[type=text] {
  display: none;
}

.rte p {
text-transform: uppercase;
font-size: 12px;
font-weight: 500;
}

.footer__quicklinks a {
text-transform: uppercase;
font-size: 12px;
font-weight: 500;
}

.footer__quicklinks li {
    margin: 0 0 12px;
}

.site-footer-wrapper h2, .footer__block .h5  {
  font-style: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
  font-weight: var(--BTN-FONT-WEIGHT);
font-weight: 800 !important;
  font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK);
  width: auto;
  background-color: #fbfbfb;
  color: #2E7D32;
  padding: var(--btn-top) var(--btn-left);
  border: 2px solid black;
font-size: 20px !important;
text-transform:uppercase;
}

.footer__block {
        padding: 0 3px;
    }

.divider,
hr {
  max-width: 100vw !important;
  border-top: solid black;
  border-width: 2px 0 0;
}

@media only screen and (max-width: 763px) {
.site-footer-wrapper h2, .footer__block .h5  {
	font-size: 20px !important;
	text-align: center;
  	font-style: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
  	font-weight: var(--BTN-FONT-WEIGHT);
	font-weight: 700 !important;
  	font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK);
  	width: auto;
  	background-color: #fbfbfb;
  	color: #2E7D32;
  	padding: var(--btn-top) var(--btn-left);
  	border: 2px solid black;
}
}
.site-footer-wrapper .wrapper--full-padded{
margin:0;}
</style>
